titleEn: New ARA 595 Sprayer Brings AI-Powered Precision to Irrigated Crops in the Western U.S.
titleZh: Ecorobotix在美国推出ARA 595超高精度喷雾机，AI驱动精准施药于灌溉作物
summaryZh: 瑞士农业科技公司Ecorobotix宣布在美国推出ARA 595超高精度（UHP）喷雾机，专为加州和亚利桑那州常见的80英寸灌溉床及侧喷灌系统设计。该设备搭载Plant-by-Plant AI™技术，可仅对需要施药的作物进行点状喷洒，减少高达95%的投入成本。工作宽度19.7英尺，速度4.5英里/小时，每小时覆盖10英亩，支持2.4×2.4英寸的超精准点喷，可安全使用非选择性除草剂。系统支持30多种作物算法，具备生菜间苗和可调安全区功能。设备将在堪萨斯州Lyons制造，7月底可发货。
translationZh:
Ecorobotix是一家专注于人工智能驱动农业技术的瑞士公司，在美国推出ARA 595超高精度（UHP）喷雾机。该设备专为加州和亚利桑那州常用的80英寸灌溉床及侧喷灌系统设计，将在堪萨斯州Lyons制造，预计7月底可发货。

ARA 595由Ecorobotix的Plant-by-Plant AI™驱动，仅在需要的地方施用作物保护产品，投入成本降低高达95%。该机器专为使用地面灌溉系统的农场设计，配备特殊设计的管道导向装置，可在作业中引导侧喷灌基础设施，为美国西南部农民带来全新水平的精准农业。

ARA 595的工作宽度为19.7英尺，行驶速度最高4.5英里/小时，每小时可覆盖10英亩。超精准的2.4×2.4英寸点喷功能使作业能够安全使用非选择性除草剂而不损伤作物。该系统还支持30多种作物算法（见作物列表），并具备生菜间苗和可调安全区等功能。

通过将先进技术与田间适用设计相结合，ARA 595代表了Ecorobotix持续致力于为全球农民提供可持续且实用的AI驱动精准农业解决方案。
featuredReason: 该新闻展示了AI与精准农业在灌溉作物上的深度融合，大幅降低化学品投入，对智慧种植领域具有显著的技术示范和环保价值。
contentFull:
By AgPR 

 

 Share

 

 

 

 

 

 Ecorobotix, a Swiss company specializing in AI-driven agricultural technology, launches the ARA595 Ultra-High Precision (UHP) Sprayer in the United States. Designed for 80-inch irrigation beds with side sprinklers commonly used in California and Arizona, the ARA595 will be manufactured in Lyons, Kansas and available to ship by the end of July.

 Powered by Ecorobotix’s Plant-by-Plant AI™, The ARA595 applies crop protection products only where needed, reducing input cost up to 95%. Built for farms using ground-level irrigation systems, the machine features specially designed pipe guides that help navigate side-sprinkler infrastructure during operation, bringing a new level of precision agriculture to farmers across Southwestern United States.

 The ARA595 features a working width of 19.7 feet and driving speed of up to 4.5 mph, covering up to 10 acres per hour. The ultra precise 2.4 x 2.4-inch spot spray enables operations to safely use non-selective herbicides without damaging crops. The system also supports over 30 crop algorithms (see list of crops) and capabilities such as lettuce thinning and adjustable safety zones.

 By combining advanced technology with field-ready design, the ARA595 represents Ecorobotix’s continued commitment to bring sustainable and practical AI-powered precision agriculture solutions to farmers worldwide.
